tasks.check: deno fmt --config deno.json --check . && deno task lint && deno task typecheck
tasks.lint: deno lint --no-config src styleguide scripts tests
tasks.typecheck: deno check --config deno.json src/mod.ts src/manifest.ts src/runtime.ts src/react.ts src/theme/discern.ts scripts/build.ts scripts/conformance.ts scripts/generate.ts scripts/measure.ts scripts/watch.ts
tasks.fix: deno fmt --config deno.json . && deno lint --no-config --fix src styleguide scripts tests
tasks.serve: deno task build && deno serve --host 127.0.0.1 --allow-read --port $(discern identity --port 2>/dev/null || echo 8010) scripts/serve.ts
tasks.watch: deno serve --config deno.json --host 127.0.0.1 --allow-read --allow-write --allow-run --allow-env=NODE_ENV --port $(discern identity --port 2>/dev/null || echo 8010) --watch=src/,styleguide/,assets/ --watch-exclude=src/generated/,styleguide/generated/,dist/ scripts/watch.ts
tasks.test: deno task test:unit && deno task conformance
tasks.verify: deno task check && deno task build && deno task check:catalogue && deno task test
